item.author: @Kimi_Moonshot

item.title: Our neurosymbolic + ontology + deterministic architecture is almost the opposite design philosophy t...
item.description:
Our neurosymbolic + ontology + deterministic architecture is almost the opposite design philosophy to the one in the quoted post:
- Retrieval is not trusted by default. - Every retrieved fact must pass deterministic validation. - Facts are not accepted because they are semantically similar; they are accepted only if they satisfy ontology rules, provenance rules, and cross-source consistency. @pierrepinna
--- @DeepLearn007 | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 74
item.author: @DeepLearn007
